very nice
5 years ago
Nickromanceron previous version 1.3.0
Works great. The only thing that need to improve is a better test bed without forcing me to keep pressing the Play/Stop button to test the built-in effects.
Was this review helpful?
6
0
o
Confusing Inspector support and documentation
2 years ago
ookk47ooon previous version 2.3.0
The official documentation left me feeling quite confused. The quickstart guide only mentioned which components to attach, but it didn't explain how to configure these components to achieve the corresponding effects. I followed the subsequent tutorials to set up effect tags, but they didn’t work as expected. It seems like the built-in effects list isn’t created by default, and it took me a long time to find the button to generate the default effects. Even after applying the effect tags, they still didn’t take effect for some reason. In preview mode, it also seems impossible to directly start the typewriter effect. The most frustrating part is that there’s no option in the Inspector to adjust the text speed. I had to dig through the source code to expose the relevant parameter. While the effects themselves look great, the usability and setup process are truly disappointing.
Was this review helpful?
5
0
A
It is good
4 years ago
AndrewSpalatoon previous version 1.3.2
Would love to see this in editor without being in play mode so I don't have to constantly play the player to see my changes.
Was this review helpful?
4
0
T
Easy to set up, simple to use
6 years ago
TonyLion previous version 1.2.0
Reviewer was gifted package by publisher.
Text Animator couldn't be simpler to set up -- just add a TextAnimator component to your TextMeshProUGUI, and optionally a TextAnimatorPlayer component if you want to play the animation automatically. It has lots of individually-configurable animation options that you specify with simple markup tags such as <wiggle>. Works great with the Dialogue System for Unity, too.
Was this review helpful?
4
0
T
Surprisingly frustrating
2 years ago
TripleScienceon previous version 2.1.0
Read and followed the docs multiple times and tried to get this to work consistently but I just can't. I get multiple fallback effect with tag "incr" and "wave" etc not found in database appearances database. It was pretty cool when it worked but the editor window is also actually quite confusing for what you'd think should be a simple asset. For example... "the tags with warning icons will not be recognised by text animator." Right so what should I do about it? These are tags that I followed in the tutorial.. There's no mention of how to address a fix in the tooltip or the docs. Also the tags get consumed in your TMPro editor as soon as they are recognised so you have to keep writing them out. ERUGH.
Was this review helpful?
3
0
G
Easiest out-of-the-box asset I've ever used.
4 years ago
GardenfiendGameson previous version 1.3.1
Easy to setup, good example scenes, great "quick start" guide, great documentation. Super simple to use straight out of the box. I am using Dialogue System for Unity, and had previously used my own custom Typewriter. I was worried about it being a huge hassle to replace it with Text Animator's typewriter - boy was I wrong. I was able to integrate Text Animator into the Dialogue System and replace my custom Typewriter in about 30 minutes. I then needed to replace all of the \. and \, commands in my dialogue database that the Dialogue System's typewriter used for pauses, with something that would work with Text Animator. I was able to create a <shortPause> and a <longPause> action in about 5 minutes. I then Find->Replaced all instances of \. and \, in my dialogue database with <shortPause> and <longPause> and my integration was complete. Highly recommend this asset!
Was this review helpful?
3
0
m
Great asset with great support
6 years ago
mpgholdenon previous version 1.2.0
Works as advertised, has great documentation, and a publicly visible roadmap for future updates. I integrated this into a custom-built dialogue system with little difficulty. I ran into one bug resulting from an unconventional use of the text animation system, and the developer responded with a fix within hours. Can't ask for more!
Was this review helpful?
3
0

看起来很酷但怎么能这么难用啊

界面和操作都很不直观，文档也乱七八糟

0
Reply from publisher:
replied 2 months ago
Hello, thank you for writing a review and for trying Text Animator! I'm sorry that was your experience and we're doing our best to improve the tool from every update. I would love if you could tell me more about which aspects you found difficult on the documentation etc., so that we can improve it for you as well! Is it about language / translation? Video support? Import/usage flow etc.? Please let us know, as that would help a lot. Thanks!

a year ago
dunkizon previous version 2.3.1

2
0
a
Pretty Amazing - 1 suggestion
4 years ago
aloftenon previous version 1.3.2
Great plugin, great support, easy to use! Very responsive team. Ive messaged them twice since ive purchased and gotten replies with one business day both times. My only note is I think the first thing taught should be how to apply effects to an entire text component rather than a piece. I think the docs focus more on how to apply to a piece of text, which is fine, but quickly becomes hard to look at in edit-mode because of the tags. The fallback system can easily apply any effects you need to entire text section - super useful but I just found this out. HOWEVER, that is just a note. I have had ZERO problems with this and it is VERY well documented.
Was this review helpful?
2
